src: So they would actually purchase the material, and then they would go away and look at pattern books and decide what sort of patterns they wanted, what sort of dress it was that they wanted to make.
mt: Quindi acquistavano il materiale, poi se ne andavano e guardavano i libri dei modelli e decidevano che tipo di modello volevano, che tipo di abito volevano realizzare.

src: Sizzling shades of terracotta teamed with cool blue create a striking effect on crisp white walls.
mt: Le tonalità calde della terracotta abbinate al blu freddo creano un effetto sorprendente su pareti bianche.

src: His smile was more of a leer, and unconsciously Rory edged nearer to Adam's powerful frame.
mt: Su sonrisa era más una mueca y, de forma inconsciente, Rory se acercó a la poderosa figura de Adam.

src: She inhaled deeply, letting it out on a low, pleasurable chuckle as she headed for the stage.
mt: Hizo una profunda inhalación y la soltó con una risita baja y placentera mientras se dirigía al escenario.

src: She could have hired a team of professionals to handle it, of course, but she'd wanted to be able to look round at the end of it all and know she'd accomplished it.
mt: Podría haber contratado a un equipo de profesionales para que se encargaran de ello, por supuesto, pero ella quería poder mirar alrededor al final de todo y saber que lo había logrado.

src: But she'd promised, albeit with great reluctance, not to confide the truth to her friend.
mt: Pero ella había prometido, aunque con gran reticencia, no confiar la verdad a su amiga.

src: We've actually talked about collaborating together.
mt: De hecho, hemos hablado de colaborar juntos.

src: Leonora also cooked when the two of them were at home, but Elise was often out dining with someone, or in Stratford at the theatre with someone else.
mt: Leonora también cocinaba cuando los dos estaban en casa, pero Elise a menudo salía a cenar con alguien, o en Stratford en el teatro con otra persona.

src: She didn't mind working for her keep, but if Penry Vaughan went on treating her as if she were some kind of serf she'd stick to plain, basic cooking from now on, she thought resentfully.
mt: A ella no le importaba trabajar para ganarse la vida, pero si Penry Vaughan seguía tratandola como si fuera una especie de siervo, ella se limitaría a cocinar platos sencillos y básicos a partir de ahora, pensó resentida.

src: Head-to-toe gold is dramatically striking for really special outings.
mt: L’oro dalla testa ai piedi è un look straordinario per le occasioni davvero speciali.

src: Providing moments of steadiness amid the upheavals of the lovers is Anthony Bailey, who performs admirably as the local doctor.
mt: Anthony Bailey, que interpreta admirablemente al médico local, aporta momentos de estabilidad en medio de los trastornos de los amantes.

src: In fact, where toxic substances are odorous, the odour can benefit health by effectively warning us of their presence.
mt: Infatti, quando le sostanze tossiche sono odorose, l'odore può essere benefico per la salute, avvisandoci efficacemente della loro presenza.

src: A matron was installed, and three helpers, one of whom cooked.
mt: Se instaló una matrona y tres ayudantes, uno de los cuales cocinaba.

src: In the struggle to advance, outmanoeuvre rivals and be heard by superiors, factional loyalty (loyalty to one's patron) may outweigh policy interest.
mt: Nella lotta per avanzare, superare i rivali e farsi sentire dai superiori, la fedeltà al partito (fedeltà al proprio patrono) può prevalere sugli interessi politici.

src: In 1986 the English YHA conducted market research, learnt some painful truths and embarked on a modernisation programme unhandily titled ‘The Product Development Marketing Plan’.
mt: Nel 1986, l'YHA inglese condusse una ricerca di mercato, apprese alcune dolorose verità e si imbarcò in un programma di modernizzazione dal titolo poco azzeccato "The Product Development Marketing Plan".

src: He retired early in 1990 after 25 years at IBM and joined Softwright a couple of months later.
mt: Se jubiló a principios de 1990 después de 25 años en IBM y se incorporó a Softwright un par de meses más tarde.

src: In effect, we are working unpaid, with a view to getting more of the benefits when the product sells.
mt: In effetti, stiamo lavorando senza essere pagati, con l’obiettivo di ottenere maggiori benefici quando il prodotto verrà venduto.

src: It was significant that, when the war worsened the following year, it was to every Anglican incumbent in the land (and no doubt to many others, though I can speak only for the parish clergy) that Duff Cooper, the Home Secretary, sent letters expressing apprehension of the state of public morale and urging the incumbents to do their utmost to help raise it.
mt: Fue significativo que, cuando la guerra empeoró el año siguiente, Duff Cooper, el Secretario del Interior, enviara cartas a todos los anglicanos del país (y sin duda a muchos otros, aunque solo puedo hablar por el clero de la parroquia) expresando su preocupación por el estado de la moral pública e instando a los titulares a hacer todo lo posible para ayudar a elevarla.

src: The details have escaped me, but he and Sir Andrew Clarke, as churchwardens (their memorial tablets are near to each other in the south transept) had been obliged to litigate over the advowson — the word which, because of its precision of meaning and its sound, I could see he enjoyed introducing; but they had evidently covered themselves in so doing, because, the Anglican Church being established, their office carried official responsibilities.
mt: I dettagli mi sono sfuggiti, ma lui e Sir Andrew Clarke, in quanto sacrestani (le loro lapidi sono vicine nel transetto sud) furono costretti a litigare per l'advowson, una parola che, per la sua precisione di significato e il suo suono, mi sembrava gli piacesse introdurre; ma evidentemente si erano protetti in tal modo, perché, essendo la Chiesa anglicana consolidata, il loro ufficio comportava responsabilità ufficiali.

src: A short-list of five lawyers was drawn up from which Diana chose.
mt: Se elaboró una lista corta de cinco abogados, de los cuales Diana eligió a uno.

src: Republicans Abroad and Democrats Abroad have been allocated 200 tickets each — preference given to those who donate £25.
mt: A los republicanos en el extranjero y a los demócratas en el extranjero se les han asignado 200 entradas cada uno, dándose preferencia a los que donen 25 £.

src: Pictures of stars who have greatly influenced the music industry over the last 25 years featured at a glittering party in New York's Four Seasons Restaurant.
mt: Las imágenes de estrellas que han influido mucho en la industria musical en los últimos 25 años se presentaron en una fiesta resplandeciente en el Four Seasons Restaurant de Nueva York.

src: Miss Crawford would probably stand a much better chance of becoming an actress if she stopped talking about it and started to take action to bring about her ambition.
mt: La señorita Crawford tendría probablemente muchas más posibilidades de convertirse en actriz si dejara de hablar de ello y empezara a actuar para lograr su ambición.

src: Where a plaintiff's injuries prevent him from performing DIY tasks, which he had previously done, the extra cost of such work is recoverable as damages.
mt: Se le lesioni del richiedente gli impediscono di eseguire lavori fai-da-te che prima eseguiva, i costi aggiuntivi di tali lavori sono recuperabili come danni.

src: If you are travelling by car, calculate as above then apply the reduction as detailed on page 80.
mt: Se si viaggia in auto, calcolare come sopra e applicare la riduzione come indicato a pagina 80.

src: He stepped forward slightly and, taking his friend's chin in his hand, lifted his face so that Ludovico was forced to look up into his eyes.
mt: Él dio un paso adelante y, tomando la barbilla de su amigo con la mano, levantó su rostro para que Ludovico se viera obligado a mirar a sus ojos.

src: What they need is not a man to support them, but a new kind of working-class politics that would provide for them and address the radicalism of their case.
mt: Lo que necesitan no es un hombre que los apoye, sino un nuevo tipo de política de clase trabajadora que los provea y que aborde el radicalismo de su caso.

src: The question can still be raised whether Pound was familiar with Virgil except through translation.
mt: La pregunta aún puede plantearse si Pound conocía a Virgilio, salvo por la traducción.

src: Mrs Cullam said nothing.
mt: La Sra. Cullam no dijo nada.

src: It was Mrs Craven's favourite garden, and she and Mr Craven used to tend to it themselves.
mt: Era el jardín favorito de la Sra. Craven, y ella y el Sr. Craven solían cuidarlo ellos mismos.

src: But their hopes were dashed in the 62nd minute when Polish striker Marcel Witeczek went on a run to score a superb individual goal.
mt: Pero sus esperanzas se desvanecieron en el minuto 62 cuando el delantero polaco Marcel Witeczek hizo una jugada para marcar un magnífico gol individual.

src: Liverpool's third choice keeper is set to jump the queue ahead of David James and debut in the absence of the suspended Bruce Grobbelaar.
mt: El tercer portero del Liverpool está preparado para saltar la fila por delante de David James y debutar en ausencia del suspendido Bruce Grobbelaar.

src: The number of times Maguire used the whip rendered suspension almost certain but the horse did look a difficult ride, drifting right after jumping the last.
mt: El número de veces que Maguire usó el látigo hizo que la suspensión fuera casi segura, pero el caballo parecía difícil de montar, y se fue a la derecha después de saltar la última.

src: None of this ‘feel the burn’ malarky which she says can be more detrimental than beneficial.
mt: Nada de esta tontería de “sentir la quemadura” que, según ella, puede ser más perjudicial que beneficiosa.

src: ‘We paid almost £9,000 for the car but we will be lucky to get £4,000 for it,’ said Mr Lewis who believes the teenager should at least have been made to perform community service.
mt: “Pagamos casi 9.000 £ por el coche, pero tendremos suerte si logramos obtener 4.000 £ por él”, dijo el Sr. Lewis, que cree que al menos se debería haber obligado al adolescente a realizar un servicio comunitario.

src: A pregnant teenager miraculously escaped last night when the car in which she was a passenger overturned.
mt: Una adolescente embarazada escapó milagrosamente anoche cuando el vehículo en el que viajaba como pasajera volcó.

src: ‘I much prefer this music,’ Herman said, shuffling awkwardly.
mt: “Prefiero esta música”, dijo Herman, caminando torpemente.

src: as if they were moving with bizarre steps, followed by Marx, Herr Nordern backed through the tiny vestibule, into the sitting-room, and a silent, apprehensive circle of Norderns.
mt: como si se movieran con pasos extraños, seguidos por Marx, el señor Nordern pasó por el pequeño vestíbulo, entró en la sala de estar y un círculo silencioso y aprensivo de Norderns.

src: No, a childminder cannot normally care for a sick child — it's not fair on the other children in her care.
mt: No, normalmente una tata non può prendersi cura di un bambino malato: non sarebbe giusto per gli altri bambini che ha in affidamento.

src: She didn't need Maggie to remind her of the odds against a baby's survival in the alleys, and she loved this one enough to give her life for it.
mt: No necesitaba que Maggie le recordara las bajas probabilidades de supervivencia de un bebé en los callejones, y la quería lo suficiente como para darle su vida por ella.

src: We also dived to a depth of 30 metres at Easdale Quarry on Seil Island.
mt: También buceamos a una profundidad de 30 metros en la cantera de Easdale, en la isla de Seil.

src: Soccer coaching for girls in Bristol has been boosted by British Gas South Western.
mt: El entrenamiento de fútbol para chicas en Bristol ha recibido un impulso de British Gas South Western.

src: Then, only a beat later it seemed to him, shame and anger swept over him again, and so overcome by these conflicting feelings was he that he had no consciousness of her in all this, until he became aware, to his surprise, that she was shaking him out of his stupor, bringing him to her again with her mouth and her hands.
mt: Entonces, solo un latido después, le pareció que la vergüenza y la ira lo invadieron de nuevo, y tan dominado por estos sentimientos contradictorios estaba que no tuvo conciencia de ella en todo esto, hasta que se dio cuenta, para su sorpresa, de que ella lo sacaba de su estupor, llevándolo de nuevo a ella con su boca y sus manos.

src: Still, in spite of the assiduous attentions which M. Apéritif and others paid her, Miranda would have liked Xanthe to reassure her in return.
mt: Sin embargo, a pesar de las atenciones asiduas que M. Apéritif y otros le prestaban, a Miranda le hubiera gustado que Xanthe la tranquilizara a cambio.

src: The famous film director from France could speak no English, and so Miranda was being sent to conduct an interview as well as provide the paper's weekly caricature; she had the address of the location, a newsagent's in the High Street of a part of the city she had never heard mentioned before, Giblett Park, though she had lived in London most of her life; the Press Office had said that he would give her ten minutes between takes, or more if she were lucky and the filming was going well and Jean-Claude Meursault was feeling mellow.
mt: La famosa directora de cine francesa no hablaba inglés, así que Miranda fue enviada para hacer una entrevista y para dibujar la caricatura semanal del periódico; tenía la dirección del lugar, una tienda de periódicos en la calle principal de una parte de la ciudad de la que nunca había oído hablar, Giblett Park, aunque había vivido en Londres la mayor parte de su vida; la oficina de prensa había dicho que le daría diez minutos entre tomas, o más si tenía suerte y la filmación iba bien y Jean-Claude Meursault se sentía bien.

src: What we are able to do in my job is to do what I was happy to do, which is to perform in aid of a charity, one soon learns how to expend one's energy and in which direction to focus it.
mt: Quello che posso fare nel mio lavoro è fare quello che mi fa piacere, che è esibirmi per beneficenza, si impara presto come spendere la propria energia e in quale direzione concentrarla.

src: The venture capitalist has been there before; he should be able to recognise the warning signs and respond appropriately.
mt: El capitalista de riesgo ya ha estado allí antes; debería ser capaz de reconocer las señales de advertencia y responder de manera apropiada.

src: D Ltd would then, in turn, pay franked to A Ltd.
mt: D Ltd pagherebbe quindi, a sua volta, a A Ltd.

src: Crawford was reported to be performing excellently, but as the inter-provincial matches were cancelled as the war worsened, the association's finances worsened too: the Coach's Fund was now deeply in debt.
mt: Se informó que Crawford tenía un rendimiento excelente, pero como los partidos interprovinciales se cancelaron a medida que la guerra empeoraba, las finanzas de la asociación también empeoraron: el Fondo del Entrenador estaba ahora muy endeudado.

src: ‘Whatever you do, I will support you,’ he wrote in 1927, ‘and if you want to speak I will meet you at Annecy at lunch any day you care to name…’
mt: “Hagas lo que hagas, te apoyaré”, escribió en 1927, “y si quieres hablar, me reuniré contigo en Annecy para almorzar cualquier día que quieras”.

src: Erm I don't know whether Charles has said anything about who people are, Barley Hall, Charles is the historical consultant, he's researched.
mt: No sé si Charles ha dicho algo sobre quiénes son las personas, Barley Hall, Charles es el consultor histórico, él ha investigado.

src: Despite qualifying sixth, the Reynard driver started superbly and was in second place by the first corner, taking the lead from Gianni Morbidelli's Lola by the end of the lap.
mt: A pesar de clasificarse en sexta posición, el piloto de Reynard tuvo un comienzo magnífico y llegó segundo a la primera curva, pasando a la cabeza del Lola de Gianni Morbidelli al final de la vuelta.

src: He had devoted Sunday evening to planning and knew exactly what he and everyone else he could press into service was going to be doing this morning.
mt: Había dedicado la tarde del domingo a planificar y sabía exactamente qué iban a hacer él y todos los demás que pudiera presionar para que prestaran servicio esta mañana.

src: Peter Yeo was obviously delighted to assist her in any way, however modest, and bustled her away, returning belatedly to ask McLeish if he would like a similar facility, which he accepted, obedient to the unwritten CID rule that you looked after your physical needs at any moment that opportunity offered, because you never knew when you were going to get stuck for hours without help.
mt: Peter Yeo estaba obviamente encantado de ayudarla en todo lo posible, aunque fuera modesto, y la llevó de un lado a otro, volviendo tardíamente para preguntarle a McLeish si quería una instalación similar, que aceptó, obediente a la norma no escrita del CID de que había que atender las necesidades físicas en cualquier momento que se presentara la oportunidad, porque nunca se sabía cuándo se podía quedar atrapado durante horas sin ayuda.

src: Or maybe she felt she could brief personally, as it were?
mt: ¿O quizás ella sentía que podía informar personalmente, por así decirlo?

src: My impression was that since it was to be held in London, Angela was handling it, with a good deal of help from colleagues at Yeo Davis.
mt: La mia impressione era che, dato che si sarebbe tenuto a Londra, Angela se ne sarebbe occupata, con l'aiuto dei colleghi di Yeo Davis.

src: SILLARS STALKER*, who was winning for the first time on the Flat when landing an apprentice handicap at Hamilton Park eight days ago, should score again at the Scottish track in today's Levy Board Handicap (5.15).
mt: SILLARS STALKER*, que ganó por primera vez en una carrera plana cuando consiguió un handicap de aprendices en Hamilton Park hace ocho días, debería volver a marcar en la pista escocesa en el Levy Board Handicap de hoy (5:15).

src: Jan was returning to competition this season and played in the curtain-raiser to the Currie Cup Final.
mt: Jan volvió a competir esta temporada y jugó en el partido de apertura de la final de la Currie Cup.

src: Students and business people alike are faced with the challenge of managing their time effectively.
mt: Gli studenti e gli uomini d'affari devono affrontare la sfida di gestire il proprio tempo in modo efficace.

src: This allows members to review briefly events on topics of interest to other members, and to update the progress of these events since the previous meeting.
mt: Questo permette ai membri di rivedere brevemente gli eventi su argomenti di interesse per gli altri membri e di aggiornare lo stato di avanzamento di questi eventi dall'ultima riunione.

src: As a result, Mitchell has told Alan to stay put, at least until the BTR pension trustees have decided about the surpluses.
mt: Como resultado, Mitchell le ha dicho a Alan que se quede donde está, al menos hasta que los administradores de pensiones de BTR decidan sobre los superávit.

src: Releasing her shoulders, he gripped her arm firmly and began steering her towards the steps down to the lawn.
mt: Al soltarle los hombros, él la agarró con firmeza del brazo y empezó a dirigirla hacia los escalones que bajaban al césped.

src: She remained silent when Travis removed her boots and jumper, nor when he lay down beside her, turning her so that they lay spoon-fashion before zipping them up into the quilted cocoon.
mt: Se mantuvo silenciosa cuando Travis le quitó las botas y el jersey, ni siquiera cuando se tumbó junto a ella, girándola para que quedaran en posición de cuchara antes de encerrarla en el capullo acolchado.

src: I'd like to know why it's so important to you, and I've been reflecting.
mt: Vorrei sapere perché è così importante per te, e ho riflettuto.

src: Rested and fed, she was ready to fight again.
mt: Descançada y alimentada, ella estaba lista para luchar de nuevo.

src: ‘But there must be a point…when you've hosed off all the muck and the glaze and the bits of overpainting and your musks of Araby have taken effect and you get to the point when you know that what you see before you is what the chap would have seen before him when he stopped painting all those centuries ago.
mt: “Pero debe haber un punto... cuando hayas quitado toda la mugre, el esmalte y los trozos de pintura que sobran y tus musks de Araby hayan hecho efecto y llegues al punto en el que sabes que lo que ves delante de ti es lo que el tipo habría visto delante de él cuando dejó de pintar hace siglos.

src: Finvest's men have been toughening the competition against RAI harder and harder by the season and now they are fighting on a match-by-match basis.
mt: Los hombres de Finvest han endurecido la competencia contra RAI cada vez más a lo largo de la temporada y ahora están luchando partido a partido.

src: Livewire offers help by providing free guidance to young entrepreneurs.
mt: Livewire offre assistenza fornendo gratuitamente consulenza ai giovani imprenditori.

src: It was on one such time early last February, two months ago, when, having driven to Cheltenham to conduct an interview, she detoured to call in.
mt: Fue en uno de esos momentos a principios de febrero pasado, hace dos meses, cuando, tras conducir hasta Cheltenham para realizar una entrevista, se desvió para llamar.

src: Bonar Law was prepared to make the right noises — in 1913 at Manchester he called for a positive social policy in Disraelian lines for "the swing of the pendulum is not enough", but he would not go further.
mt: Bonar Law estaba preparado para hacer los ruidos adecuados: en 1913, en Manchester, pidió una política social positiva en línea con Disraeli porque «el giro del péndulo no es suficiente», pero no quiso ir más lejos.

src: Police found his body buried in a back-garden cesspit, and the widow was last seen by her next-door neighbour performing a voodoo ritual in the garden with blood smeared on the doorsteps.
mt: La policía encontró su cuerpo enterrado en una fosa séptica del jardín trasero, y la viuda fue vista por última vez por su vecino de al lado realizando un ritual vudú en el jardín con sangre untada en los umbrales de las puertas.

src: In particular, if the quantity of money is the prime determinant of aggregate demand, it follows from the analysis in chapter 4 that the predictable component of the rate of growth of the quantity of money will not impact any real variable such as the level of output or the level of unemployment; only the unpredictable or random component of monetary growth will affect real variables.
mt: In particolare, se la quantità di moneta è il fattore determinante della domanda aggregata, dalla analisi del capitolo 4 ne consegue che la componente prevedibile del tasso di crescita della quantità di moneta non avrà alcun impatto su alcuna variabile reale come il livello di produzione o il livello di disoccupazione; solo la componente imprevedibile o casuale della crescita monetaria avrà un effetto sulle variabili reali.

src: I must go to England to conduct my business and I want to marry Elizabeth when I return.
mt: Devo andare in Inghilterra per condurre i miei affari e voglio sposare Elizabeth quando tornerò.

src: The scope for Labour to negotiate is greater.
mt: El margen de negociación del Partido Laborista es mayor.

src: A customer who has bought something significant may then realise that he needs other, smaller items.
mt: Un cliente che ha acquistato qualcosa di importante potrebbe poi capire di aver bisogno di altri articoli più piccoli.

src: In order to make this decision, the retailer needs to conduct market research into the socioeconomics of the area.
mt: Per prendere questa decisione, il rivenditore deve condurre ricerche di mercato sulle condizioni socioeconomiche dell'area.

src: If you already work in a shop — or have retail experience in the past, you may find that some of the procedures described here are done differently where you work.
mt: Se lavori già in un negozio, o hai già esperienza nel settore, potresti scoprire che alcune delle procedure descritte qui sono eseguite in modo diverso dove lavori.

src: We know that Julian had at least two servants called Sara and Alice, who shopped and ran errands.
mt: Sabemos que Julián tenía al menos dos sirvientas llamadas Sara y Alice, que hacían las compras y las tareas.

src: It's very good thing for the party and they're usually quite starved of practical campaigning ideas and so we regularly try at least every year to go and tour and we've been giving them we're trying to rope them in on the various activities because they're crying out for
mt: Es algo muy bueno para el partido y suelen estar bastante hambrientos de ideas prácticas de campaña y, por eso, intentamos regularmente, al menos una vez al año, ir de gira y les hemos estado dando, intentamos involucrarlos en las diversas actividades porque están clamando por ello

src: But those who really wish to curry favour with Mad Carew can sponsor a five-course dinner plus wine for two for £70 and receive recognition on this page.
mt: Ma chi desidera davvero ingraziarsi Mad Carew può sponsorizzare una cena di cinque portate più vino per due a £70 e ricevere un riconoscimento su questa pagina.

src: She had had eight children, only four of whom survived, and had engaged in manual labor all her life because my grandfather had poor health.
mt: Ella había tenido ocho hijos, de los cuales solo cuatro sobrevivieron, y se había dedicado a trabajos manuales toda su vida porque mi abuelo tenía mala salud.

src: Please note that the individual hotels may charge for car parking.
mt: Si prega di notare che i singoli hotel possono addebitare il parcheggio.

src: But the note that accompanied it did not refer to the choice of name and it was rather a cold note.
mt: Ma la nota che l'accompagnava non faceva riferimento alla scelta del nome ed era piuttosto fredda.

src: In fact, he had even offered a sophisticated remark.
mt: De hecho, incluso había hecho un comentario sofisticado.

src: I knew he loved and needed me, but the fact that while I washed up, scrubbed, cleaned and tidied for us both he was communicating with people I had never met, would never meet, and whose names I did not know, formed a cloud over my days.
mt: Sabía que me quería y que me necesitaba, pero el hecho de que mientras yo me lavaba, fregaba, limpiaba y ordenaba para los dos, él se comunicaba con personas que nunca había conocido, que nunca conocería y cuyos nombres no sabía, formaba una nube sobre mis días.

src: The ‘naked’ crab moved about 60 cm (2 ft) away while the first crab nipped out of its damaged shell and moved into the new one.
mt: El cangrejo “desnudo” se desplazó unos 60 cm (2 pies) mientras el primer cangrejo salía de su caparazón dañado y se desplazaba al nuevo.

src: Hopefully, the reader now understands the various payment methods, sources of finance and risks associated with international trade.
mt: Si spera che il lettore ora comprenda i vari metodi di pagamento, le fonti di finanziamento e i rischi associati al commercio internazionale.

src: I would bounce on a bed till I was high enough, then I'd flip, backwards and forwards.
mt: Saltaba en la cama hasta que estaba lo suficientemente alto, y entonces me daba la vuelta, hacia atrás y hacia adelante.

src: Also, Tabitha never quite got around to maintaining as much as she meant to.
mt: Además, Tabitha nunca llegó a mantenerlo tanto como ella quería.

src: We need to know why the Origin of Species was highly influential despite the relative failure of its chief explanatory tool.
mt: Dobbiamo capire perché l'Origine delle Specie ha avuto un'influenza così grande nonostante il relativo fallimento del suo principale strumento esplicativo.

src: Right, we'll register now please and if you could just tell me the...
mt: De acuerdo, nos registraremos ahora, por favor, y si me pudiera decir...

src: BESO looks forward to developing its collaboration with TRANSAID and to leveraging its bank of expertise, not only in transportation but also in other fields in support of TRANSAID's objectives.
mt: BESO è lieta di sviluppare la sua collaborazione con TRANSAID e di sfruttare la sua banca di competenze, non solo nel settore dei trasporti ma anche in altri settori a sostegno degli obiettivi di TRANSAID.

src: Usually, I know exactly what I want, but it is much better if you can get other people to do it and let them be recognized.
mt: Di solito so esattamente cosa voglio, ma è molto meglio se riesci a convincere altre persone a farlo e a far sì che siano riconosciute.

src: On termination by the Buyer in accordance with clause (a) the following provisions shall have effect:(i) all sums payable by the Buyer under the contract cease to be payable;(ii) the Seller must repay to the Buyer all sums paid by the Buyer prior to termination; and (iii) the Buyer is entitled to recover damages from the Seller in respect of any losses caused to the Buyer as a result of the Seller's failure to deliver or as a result of the termination of the contract.
mt: In caso di risoluzione da parte dell'Acquirente in conformità con la clausola (a), si applicano le seguenti disposizioni: (i) tutte le somme dovute dall'Acquirente ai sensi del contratto cessano di essere dovute; (ii) il Venditore deve rimborsare all'Acquirente tutte le somme pagate dall'Acquirente prima della risoluzione; e (iii) l'Acquirente ha il diritto di recuperare i danni dal Venditore in relazione a qualsiasi perdita causata all'Acquirente a seguito della mancata consegna da parte del Venditore o a seguito della risoluzione del contratto.

src: In Kennedy v. Broun (1863) 13 C.B. 677 (Common Pleas) Erle C.J. said that in Lampleigh v. Brathwait, ‘it was assumed that the journeys which the plaintiff performed at the request of the defendant, and the other services he rendered, would have been sufficient to render any promise enforceable if it had been connected therewith in one contract; the peculiarity of the decision lies in connecting a subsequent promise with a prior consideration after it had been executed.

src: These authorities suggest that a promise to pay money, or to perform any other action, in a certain event but without any express or implied request to the promisee to bring about, or to promise to bring about, that event, is made without consideration.

src: For example, if you have already made available literature dealing with questions such as holidays/pensions/conditions of work and the candidate chooses to ask about them it may well indicate that she/he is the sort of person who has not done their research thoroughly.
mt: Per esempio, se avete già messo a disposizione materiale che tratta di questioni come ferie, pensioni, condizioni di lavoro e il candidato sceglie di chiedere a riguardo, potrebbe indicare che non ha fatto una ricerca approfondita.

src: He also implied that the Arts Council might soon emphasize its former role as a policy body as well as a grant-giving organisation.
mt: También insinuó que el Arts Council podría enfatizar pronto su antiguo papel como organismo de políticas, así como como organización que otorga subvenciones.

src: Sun Microsystems Inc is spreading its favours around, and after entering into a major agreement with Oracle Corp on its manufacturing software, has now signed a new unlimited use licence for various database products from Sybase Inc, Emeryville, California for deployment in its operations.
mt: Sun Microsystems Inc está repartiendo favores por todas partes y, tras llegar a un importante acuerdo con Oracle Corp sobre su software de fabricación, ha firmado ahora una nueva licencia de uso ilimitado para varios productos de bases de datos de Sybase Inc, Emeryville, California, para su implementación en sus operaciones.

src: He stepped out of her way and she breathed deeply as she ran to the door and slammed it shut behind her.
mt: Él se apartó de su camino y ella respiró profundamente mientras corría a la puerta y la cerraba con fuerza.

src: She breathed shakily, looked up at her uncle.
mt: Ella respiró con dificultad y miró a su tío.

src: Then, ‘Come on, we'd better begin.
mt: Entonces, ‘Vamos, mejor empezamos.

src: Changes in technology and the associated decline in the size of the farm labour force have also exerted a profound influence on the relationship between the farm worker and his employer.
mt: Anche i cambiamenti tecnologici e la conseguente riduzione della forza lavoro agricola hanno esercitato una profonda influenza sui rapporti tra i lavoratori agricoli e i loro datori di lavoro.

src: Visiting me in hospital, hot foot from the Middle East, with his Brigadier's tabs and row of medals, he stroked his moustache and said in crisp tones, ‘Pity you hadn't achieved higher rank, boy.
mt: Visítame en el hospital, recién llegado del Medio Oriente, con sus insignias de brigadier y su fila de medallas, se acarició el bigote y dijo con un tono seco: “Es una pena que no hayas alcanzado un puesto más alto, chico.

src: Tell your audience of children (or adults) that you are going to perform a combination of mind reading with great mathematical ability.
mt: Dite al vostro pubblico di bambini (o adulti) che eseguerete una combinazione di lettura della mente con grande abilità matematica.

src: It is tempting to be cynical that compact disc is ‘all in the numbers’, and in most cases there is little to choose between them.
mt: Es tentador ser cínico y pensar que los discos compactos son “todo un número”, y en la mayoría de los casos hay poco que elegir entre ellos.

src: This would, in fact, be perfectly suited to the works, were it not for the fact that the packaging completely misleads the purchaser as to the playing order of the music: it is listed as (in order)— but the disc actually plays, so that there's not a single track which corresponds with the one listed in the sleeve note!
mt: In effetti, sarebbe perfetto per l'opera, se non fosse per il fatto che l'imballaggio inganna completamente l'acquirente sull'ordine di riproduzione della musica: è elencato come (in ordine) - ma il disco in realtà suona in modo che non c'è una singola traccia che corrisponde a quella elencata nella nota di copertina!

src: If you will permit me to suggest, they would be better meantime with a tutor at home, and a governess for the girls.
mt: Se mi permettete un suggerimento, nel frattempo farebbero meglio a stare con un tutor a casa, e una governante per le ragazze.

src: Thereafter, because he patently thought my laughter geometry chart was the first sign of incipient lunacy, I would play the lines, then turn upstage and gesticulate wildly demonstrating the sausage shape of the laugh, which never failed to roll him up.
mt: Después, como él pensaba que mi tabla de geometría de la risa era el primer signo de una locura incipiente, yo recitaba las líneas, luego me volvía hacia el escenario y gesticulaba desenfrenadamente demostrando la forma de salchicha de la risa, lo que nunca dejaba de hacer que se echara a reír.

src: Worse still was the Tories' refusal year after year to commit to the productive base of the economy — education and training, research and development, science, transport and communication.
mt: Ancora peggio è stato il rifiuto dei Tory, anno dopo anno, di impegnarsi per la base produttiva dell’economia: istruzione e formazione, ricerca e sviluppo, scienza, trasporti e comunicazioni.

src: Delegates also refused to recognize existing black sections officially.
mt: Los delegados también se negaron a reconocer oficialmente las secciones negras existentes.

src: Appropriate information needed for a user to decide is also retrieved before presenting the command options, for example, maps with the correct specifications (e.g. with topological relations already created, when this is necessary for the operation).
mt: También se recupera la información adecuada que necesita un usuario para decidir antes de presentar las opciones de comando, por ejemplo, mapas con las especificaciones correctas (por ejemplo, con relaciones topológicas ya creadas, cuando esto es necesario para la operación).

src: Schools may feel powerless to alter a situation in which wider economic and political forces exert a significant influence.
mt: Le scuole possono sentirsi impotenti di fronte a una situazione in cui le forze economiche e politiche più ampie esercitano un'influenza significativa.

src: The third practice had overspent because it had taken over a smaller practice after the preparatory work on budget setting had been completed, and it had not been able to estimate accurately the prescribing costs for the 1300 patients involved.
mt: La terza pratica aveva superato il budget perché aveva rilevato una pratica più piccola dopo che il lavoro preparatorio sulla definizione del budget era stato completato e non era stata in grado di stimare con precisione i costi delle prescrizioni per i 1300 pazienti coinvolti.

src: In a letter to the Stanford committee on research, the faculty said: ‘For years we have been able to tell visiting school children, students, engineers, scientists, laymen and the press that we are here to research the fundamental properties of matter and that we do not undertake any military work.
mt: In una lettera al comitato di ricerca di Stanford, la facoltà ha dichiarato: "Per anni siamo stati in grado di dire ai bambini delle scuole, agli studenti, agli ingegneri, agli scienziati, ai laici e alla stampa che siamo qui per studiare le proprietà fondamentali della materia e che non intraprendiamo alcun lavoro militare.

src: So the capacity to thoroughly examine the subject is inhibited by one of its most important characteristics.
mt: Quindi la capacità di esaminare a fondo l'argomento è inibita da una delle sue caratteristiche più importanti.

src: If the loans were found to have been sold at a loss, the vendor would repay, dependent on whether there had been a reduction in the bank's tax liability or not.
mt: Se si constati che i prestiti sono stati venduti in perdita, il venditore rimborsa, a seconda che vi sia stata o meno una riduzione dell’imposta dovuta dalla banca.

src: In the current judicial climate, difficulties in categorisation should not render a judgment in contention any more likely to be upset.
mt: Nell’attuale clima giudiziario, le difficoltà di classificazione non dovrebbero rendere più probabile l’annullamento di una sentenza controversa.

src: The choice of reference, whether it is to be to expert or arbitrator, is in any event usually made at the time of the original contract which precedes the time when the parties know whether they have an "issue to settle" or a "formulated dispute", and they will be obliged to use whatever procedure was stipulated, unless they reach another agreement.
mt: La scelta del riferimento, sia esso un esperto o un arbitro, è in ogni caso solitamente effettuata al momento del contratto originale che precede il momento in cui le parti sanno se hanno una "questione da risolvere" o una "controversia formulata", e saranno obbligate a utilizzare qualsiasi procedura sia stata stipulata, a meno che non raggiungano un altro accordo.

src: This was made very clear to me early in my fieldwork when I offended a neighbour by trying to repay the food that had been given to my wife and me.
mt: Questo mi è stato chiarito molto presto durante il mio lavoro sul campo quando ho offeso un vicino cercando di ripagare il cibo che era stato dato a mia moglie e a me.

src: She thought of Charles at the University of Suffolk, lecturing, perhaps, on Romantic landscape poetry, illustrated with slides.
mt: Pensó en Charles en la Universidad de Suffolk, dando una conferencia, quizás, sobre poesía romántica del paisaje, ilustrada con diapositivas.

src: ‘And what about all the times I've asked your advice while you were gardening?’ he teased.
mt: “¿Y qué hay de todas las veces que te pedí consejo mientras hacías jardinería?”, le preguntó.

src: Indeed, Dr Tony Underwood of the University of Sydney suggests that to control the crown of thorns starfish could, in the end, have a more harmful effect on the reef than a beneficial one.
mt: Infatti, il dottor Tony Underwood dell'Università di Sydney suggerisce che il controllo della corona di stelle marine delle spine potrebbe, alla fine, avere un effetto più dannoso sulla barriera corallina che benefico.

src: We see what conditions would be like without water by observing modern deserts, which commonly fluctuate from +45°C to around zero, in the course of twelve hours!
mt: Possiamo vedere quali sarebbero le condizioni senza acqua osservando i deserti moderni, che comunemente oscillano da +45°C a circa zero, nel corso di dodici ore!

src: When our first Report on the primary stages was submitted to Mr Baker at the end of September 1988, he felt that we had underemphasized the teaching of grammar.
mt: Quando il nostro primo rapporto sulle fasi primarie è stato presentato al signor Baker alla fine di settembre 1988, egli ha ritenuto che avessimo sottovalutato l'insegnamento della grammatica.

src: For it received the neglect that a great deal of insider research achieves and was channelled (unopened) to me, accompanied by a two-line memo from a senior officer which suggested, ‘I understand you are pursuing research; you may find this useful’.
mt: Porque recibió la negligencia que logra una gran cantidad de investigaciones internas y me fue canalizada (sin abrir) acompañada de un memorando de dos líneas de un alto oficial que sugería: “Entiendo que está realizando una investigación; puede que esto le resulte útil”.

src: Sir Montague Levine, the coroner, said he strongly disapproved of their attitude and would seek Foreign Office help to get more information.
mt: Sir Montague Levine, il medico legale, ha affermato di disapprovare fortemente il loro atteggiamento e ha cercato l'aiuto del Ministero degli Esteri per ottenere maggiori informazioni.

src: At the same time, between 12 and 14 IRA men selected to escape were apparently preparing to blast an inside gate with some of the smuggled Semtex.
mt: Al mismo tiempo, entre 12 y 14 hombres del IRA seleccionados para la fuga se estaban preparando para hacer explotar una puerta interior con algo de Semtex de contrabando.

src: It is a time when we can breathe deeply, assess where we are and make a start on our anticipatory mourning for our fate.
mt: Es un momento en el que podemos respirar profundamente, evaluar dónde estamos y comenzar nuestro luto anticipatorio por nuestro destino.

src: Most either thought it didn't matter as long as they found comfort from their tension and frustration and saw it as a way of keeping the peace, but some were trying through women's groups or assertion therapy to express themselves more honestly.
mt: La mayoría pensaba que no importaba, siempre que encontraran consuelo para su tensión y frustración y lo vieran como una forma de mantener la paz, pero algunos estaban tratando, a través de grupos de mujeres o terapia de afirmación, de expresarse con más honestidad.

src: Now, if you use any financial monitor that we have, and bearing in mind the size of the task, any critical analysis will reveal that this Council, under Labour, can definitely say that it's met the challenge and it's certainly started to reform.
mt: Ahora, si se utiliza cualquier monitor financiero que tengamos, y teniendo en cuenta el tamaño de la tarea, cualquier análisis crítico revelará que este Consejo, bajo el Partido Laborista, puede decir definitivamente que ha superado el reto y que ciertamente ha comenzado a reformarse.

src: In fact, says WG, sales had amounted to £8.5m and Alkar had incurred a loss.
mt: De hecho, dice WG, las ventas ascendieron a 8,5 millones de libras y Alkar había incurrido en una pérdida.

src: So if the semantics/pragmatics distinction is to have an impact at all, we can try and shift the study of indexicals into semantics.
mt: Quindi, se la distinzione semantica/pragmatica deve avere un impatto, possiamo provare a spostare lo studio degli indici nella semantica.

src: Although you need complicated equipment to analyze fully, you can, however, get a good idea from the colour, smell and taste.
mt: Anche se per un'analisi completa sono necessari strumenti complicati, è possibile farsi un'idea generale dal colore, dall'odore e dal sapore.

src: The Mercedes and Bentley may have been the show stars; elsewhere, though, son of beach buggy was experiencing a resurgence.
mt: El Mercedes y el Bentley pueden haber sido las estrellas del espectáculo; sin embargo, en otros lugares, el hijo del buggy de playa estaba experimentando un resurgimiento.

src: Two cars managed to avoid him, but Roberto Moreno, holding a steady fourth in the Benetton, ran straight into the front of the Williams, seriously damaging both.
mt: Dos coches consiguieron esquivarlo, pero Roberto Moreno, que iba en una posición estable en cuarto lugar con el Benetton, se estrelló contra la parte delantera del Williams, dañando gravemente ambos.

src: Flowers and foliage still form an important part of this winter spectacle and this month we examine this inspiring part of the gardening calendar while reviewing the rest of the year.
mt: I fiori e il fogliame costituiscono ancora una parte importante di questo spettacolo invernale e questo mese esaminiamo questa parte ispiratrice del calendario del giardinaggio mentre rivediamo il resto dell'anno.

src: The Pentagon translated unofficially, which did the rounds on Capitol Hill.
mt: El Pentágono hizo una traducción no oficial, que hizo las rondas en Capitol Hill.

src: Alex Household smiled twistedly and announced ironically, ‘Right, here we go.
mt: Alex Household sonrió de forma retorcida y anunció irónicamente: “Bien, vamos.

src: Grateful to the minister for that reply but would he not agree with me that where local authorities, erm local chambers of commerce and trades councils er and his own department of employment, are already working well together with good small initiatives, to put upon them English Estates, TECs, British coal enterprise er is in fact to do precisely what he does not advocate to make a mushrooming of bureaucracy and will he not undertake to evaluate these initiatives to see if they really are effective or whether they're just providing jobs for the boys.
mt: Le agradezco al ministro su respuesta, pero ¿no estaría de acuerdo conmigo en que, cuando las autoridades locales, las cámaras de comercio locales y los consejos de comercio, y su propio departamento de empleo ya están trabajando bien juntos en buenas iniciativas pequeñas, ponerles encima a English Estates, TECs, British Coal Enterprise, es en realidad hacer precisamente lo que él no defiende: crear un crecimiento desmesurado de la burocracia, y ¿no se compromete a evaluar estas iniciativas para ver si realmente son eficaces o si están simplemente creando puestos de trabajo para los chicos?

src: Christopher, lunging for the money, fell into George who fell into the coffee table and knocked over a vase of daisies, drenching the sofa, the carpet and a large part of Mrs Morrison.
mt: Christopher, que se lanzó sobre el dinero, cayó sobre George, que cayó sobre la mesa de centro y derribó un jarrón de margaritas, empapando el sofá, la alfombra y una gran parte de la Sra. Morrison.

src: It has behind it an ideal; it aims primarily at getting working men and women of this country abroad in order that the scales shall fall from their eyes through real comradeship with manual labourers in other countries.
mt: Ha dietro di sé un ideale; mira principalmente a portare gli uomini e le donne lavoratori di questo paese all'estero in modo che le scale cadano dai loro occhi attraverso una vera e propria amicizia con i lavoratori manuali di altri paesi.

src: He grasped the timber and, tensing two muscled arms, lifted the whole load clear of the skip.
mt: Él agarró la madera y, tensando los dos brazos musculosos, levantó toda la carga del contenedor.

src: Its chairman, Mr Tony Millar, has reached an agreement with the US Corporate Partners group which invests some £1billion of funds on behalf of US and foreign institutions like pension funds.
mt: Il suo presidente, Tony Millar, ha raggiunto un accordo con il gruppo US Corporate Partners che investe circa 1 miliardo di sterline di fondi per conto di istituzioni statunitensi e straniere, come fondi pensione.

src: To find someone able to work on Land Rovers, look in the LRO ads. We recently purchased a 1983 Land Rover County 110 2.25 petrol.
mt: Per trovare qualcuno in grado di lavorare sui Land Rover, consultate gli annunci LRO. Abbiamo recentemente acquistato una Land Rover County 110 2.25 benzina del 1983.

src: Andy plays a significant role in the design side, having the enjoyment of being able to turn ideas into reality and then use them to give a financial return.
mt: Andy svolge un ruolo significativo nella progettazione, avendo il piacere di trasformare le idee in realtà e poi utilizzarle per dare un ritorno finanziario.

src: And then went to Sainsbury's to shop.
mt: Y luego fuimos a Sainsbury's a comprar.

src: ‘Defence sources in Britain say the man may have wreaked havoc on the NATO alliance before his exposure last week,’ Loretta read.
mt: “Fuentes de la defensa en Gran Bretaña dicen que el hombre podría haber causado estragos en la alianza de la OTAN antes de su exposición la semana pasada”, leyó Loretta.

src: ‘If you've got time to go into the Herald office this afternoon, I've arranged for you to view his file in our library,’ he told her.
mt: “Si tienes tiempo de venir a la oficina de Herald esta tarde, he hecho los arreglos para que veas su expediente en nuestra biblioteca”, le dijo.

src: Without naming names, there are some bands I work with and if they are being interviewed, I will have to be there in case they don't turn up and I end up making loads of phone calls.
mt: Sin nombrar nombres, hay algunas bandas con las que trabajo y si las están entrevistando, tendré que estar allí en caso de que no aparezcan y termine haciendo un montón de llamadas telefónicas.

src: Verdict: provides a welcome break from The Bill
mt: Veredicto: ofrece un descanso bienvenido de The Bill

src: Wealthy people buy the houses from the Trust, employ builders to restore them and move in when all is ready.
mt: Le persone ricche comprano le case dal Trust, assumono costruttori per restaurarle e si trasferiscono quando tutto è pronto.

src: Lady Goulding, who has made a remarkable impact for the needy in Dublin, and is a Founder Member of the Central Remedial Clinic which specialises in helping children with cerebral palsy.
mt: Lady Goulding, che ha avuto un notevole impatto sui bisognosi di Dublino, ed è un membro fondatore della Central Remedial Clinic che si specializza nell'aiutare i bambini con paralisi cerebrale.

src: Much knowledge has been accumulated since the antiquarians first started to become interested, and archaeology has become an increasingly scientific discipline, using modern techniques such as aerial photography which has vastly increased the number of known sites, and carbon dating which has caused radical rethinking of accepted chronology.
mt: Molte conoscenze sono state accumulate da quando gli antiquari hanno iniziato a interessarsi di questo argomento e l'archeologia è diventata una disciplina sempre più scientifica, che utilizza tecniche moderne come la fotografia aerea, che ha notevolmente aumentato il numero di siti conosciuti, e la datazione al carbonio, che ha portato a una radicale riconsiderazione della cronologia accettata.

src: Local residents, once hinted at, can be useful allies in preserving these forgotten features of their heritage.
mt: Gli abitanti del luogo, una volta sensibilizzati, possono essere alleati utili nella salvaguardia di questi elementi dimenticati del loro patrimonio.

src: The centre also houses the IDB sub-centre of the Northern Ireland Euro Info Centre and is well placed to provide information on steps being taken to complete the Single European Market.
mt: Il centro ospita anche il sottocentro IDB dell'Euro Info Centre dell'Irlanda del Nord ed è in grado di fornire informazioni sulle misure adottate per completare il mercato unico europeo.

src: Some shape names are complex and, if pupils do not fully understand the properties of a shape, it is not likely that their memory for its name will be enduring.
mt: Alcuni nomi di forme sono complessi e, se gli studenti non comprendono appieno le proprietà di una forma, è improbabile che la loro memoria del nome sia duratura.

src: Instead of the relatively modest array of administrative buildings originally conceived for the Civic Centre, she showed vision to propose a grandiose solution fit to commemorate the rule of Nicolae Ceauşescu.
mt: Invece della serie relativamente modesta di edifici amministrativi originariamente concepiti per il Centro Civico, lei ha avuto la visione di proporre una soluzione grandiosa adatta a commemorare il governo di Nicolae Ceauşescu.

src: Linked to the mobility allowance is a voluntary organization called Motability, which helps disabled people utilize their allowance effectively to acquire a private car by leasing on hire purchase.
mt: Collegata all'indennità di mobilità c'è un'organizzazione volontaria chiamata Motability, che aiuta le persone disabili a utilizzare in modo efficace l'indennità per acquistare un'auto privata tramite un contratto di prestito con patto di compravendita.

src: It used to be considered that, if a patient was compulsorily detained, treatment was then at the discretion of the psychiatrist in charge of the case because such a person was not always able or willing to consent.
mt: In passato si riteneva che, se un paziente era stato trattenuto in modo coercitivo, il trattamento era a discrezione dello psichiatra responsabile del caso, perché la persona non era sempre in grado o disponibile a dare il consenso.

src: She gestured, indicating the scatter of bodies.
mt: Hizo un gesto indicando la dispersión de cuerpos.

src: The crate-people ignored them but arranged their food to the left of them, erected a cross in front of them while their leader pulled an angled prop from behind the picture he was holding and positioned it in the pebbles to the right of the dedicated gathering.
mt: La gente de las cajas los ignoró, pero les puso la comida a la izquierda, erigió una cruz delante de ellos mientras su líder sacó un soporte en ángulo de detrás de la imagen que sostenía y lo colocó en los guijarros a la derecha de la reunión dedicada.

src: She realized that the child was smiling straight at her but she was too tired to engage with her, too detached to engage, too hidden to do anything but take a photograph and her fingers felt too weak even to do this.
mt: Ella se dio cuenta de que la niña le estaba sonriendo directamente, pero estaba demasiado cansada para involucrarse con ella, demasiado desapegada para involucrarse, demasiado oculta para hacer nada más que tomar una fotografía y sus dedos se sentían demasiado débiles incluso para hacer esto.

src: Gordon sees Ibrox and is thrilled.
mt: Gordon ve Ibrox y está emocionado.

src: Although the company had already agreed to continue paying existing pensioners, it had not committed to past and present employees retiring now and in the future.
mt: Aunque la empresa ya había acordado seguir pagando a los pensionistas actuales, no se había comprometido con los empleados pasados y presentes que se jubilaran ahora y en el futuro.

src: The company is celebrating with an increase in the final dividend, payable on July 6, to 3.2p (3p), which represents a 5 percent increase in the full-year payment to 5.8p.
mt: La empresa está celebrando con un aumento del dividendo final, pagadero el 6 de julio, a 3,2 p (3 p), lo que supone un aumento del 5 % en el pago anual a 5,8 p.

src: One of the biggest problems in working with these young people is overcoming their anti-school attitudes and convincing the former that they do have the ability and the latter that education is essential if they are to succeed in life.
mt: Uno dei problemi più grandi nel lavorare con questi giovani è superare i loro atteggiamenti anti-scuola e convincere i primi che hanno la capacità e i secondi che l'istruzione è essenziale se vogliono avere successo nella vita.

src: They expand and develop but also look at other areas to move into.
mt: Si espandono e si sviluppano, ma guardano anche ad altre aree in cui muoversi.

src: She drank deeply of her tea and then continued, ‘Anyway, she'll go before long, never fear.’
mt: Ella bebió profundamente de su té y continuó: «De todos modos, se irá antes de que pase mucho tiempo, no tenga miedo».

src: A few years ago I lectured at Preston Polytechnic and afterwards nine black girls, some of them with toddlers, stayed behind and we began to talk.
mt: Hace unos años, di una conferencia en la Politécnica de Preston y después, nueve chicas negras, algunas de ellas con niños pequeños, se quedaron y empezamos a hablar.

src: Thus, if X, Y and Z trustees direct A Ltd, the shares of which are owned by the trust, to pay dividends to B (the beneficiary) direct, or the agent of B, and the trustees file a tax return to the Revenue then they are not required to take any further steps with regard to the assessment of B to income tax.
mt: Quindi, se i fiduciari X, Y e Z danno istruzioni a A Ltd, le cui azioni sono di proprietà del trust, di pagare dividendi direttamente a B (il beneficiario) o all’agente di B, e i fiduciari presentano una dichiarazione dei redditi all’Agenzia delle Entrate, non sono tenuti a compiere ulteriori azioni in merito alla dichiarazione dei redditi di B.

src: Leaf-roll sawfly This clever little beast is described adequately and discussed in the answer to question number 52 on page 208, which, with Figure 13 above, will enable you to spot that it has been on your plants.
mt: La mosca della foglia a rotolo Questa piccola bestia intelligente è descritta adeguatamente e discussa nella risposta alla domanda numero 52 a pagina 208, che, con la Figura 13 sopra, vi permetterà di individuare che è stata sulle vostre piante.

src: She had certainly not worked manually.
mt: Ella no había trabajado de forma manual.

src: I think that if today we can offer some assistance to those who are carrying on the race the money will not be wasted.
mt: Penso che se oggi possiamo offrire un po' di assistenza a chi continua la corsa, il denaro non sarà sprecato.

src: The advantages to a business of utilizing planning and forecasting techniques are then described.
mt: Vengono quindi descritti i vantaggi per un'azienda dell'utilizzo di tecniche di pianificazione e previsione.

src: So will I have to upgrade by replacement in order to use the software I have at the moment?
mt: Quindi dovrò effettuare un aggiornamento sostitutivo per poter utilizzare il software che ho al momento?

src: This is fine if they contract with a large maintenance company, but it's less likely to happen if the service is provided by the company itself.
mt: Questo è possibile se si stipula un contratto con una grande società di manutenzione, ma è meno probabile che ciò avvenga se il servizio è fornito dalla stessa società.

src: If it is proposed to borrow the money for the investment, the DCF yield is the highest interest rate the company can pay without losing money.
mt: Si se propone tomar prestado el dinero para la inversión, el rendimiento DCF es la tasa de interés más alta que la empresa puede pagar sin perder dinero.

src: How do you bring a group of people together to work on an equal basis when half the members of the group are experienced non-disabled professionals who are used to asserting their authority?

src: When we want to make a muscle contract the brain sends a nerve impulse through the spinal chord, into the peripheral nerves and out along those nerves to the muscle and each individual muscle fibre has a single junction, a nerve muscle junction, where the nerve innervates the muscle, and that is the site at which the stimulus leads to muscle contraction.

src: Elite theory accounts of state organization are developed and detailed, and we first review five aspects where the approach has contributed distinctively: the role of political leaderships in liberal democracies, the predominance of bureaucracies in shaping policy-making, the reasons for fragmentation (or centralization) of governmental tiers and sectors, the role of law, and the strong policy connections between government activities and major economic interests.
mt: Le teorie dell'élite sull'organizzazione dello Stato sono sviluppate e dettagliate, e in primo luogo esaminiamo cinque aspetti in cui l'approccio ha contribuito in modo distintivo: il ruolo delle leadership politiche nelle democrazie liberali, il predominio delle burocrazie nel plasmare le politiche, le ragioni della frammentazione (o centralizzazione) dei livelli e dei settori governativi, il ruolo della legge e i forti collegamenti politici tra le attività governative e i principali interessi economici.

mt: Los caballeros de la orquesta hicieron sus habituales y suaves silbidos de aprobación y yo di vueltas, hice una profunda reverencia y dije: “Buenas noches, caballeros”.

src: We went on to deliver a superb matinée and came off to thunderous applause and whistles of appreciation.
mt: Proseguimos con una magnífica función matinal y salimos con un tremendo aplauso y silbidos de reconocimiento.

src: Which is good news, I mean, from a client, they're in charge of whether they keep you going or not.
mt: Lo que es una buena noticia, quiero decir, de un cliente, ellos son los encargados de decidir si te mantienen o no.

src: Simon complains of ‘the unsuitable blue chosen by Mr Serota’ for the Tate's walls and adds: ‘If there is some deep strategy for this marginalisation of the British collection it is certainly being effective, for there are fewer pictures on view than ever before.’
mt: Simon si lamenta dell’"inappropriato blu scelto da Mr Serota" per le pareti della Tate e aggiunge: "Se c'è una strategia profonda per questa marginalizzazione della collezione britannica, è certamente efficace, perché ci sono meno immagini in mostra che mai prima".

src: It would perhaps be better to concentrate on supporting the newly elected socialist MPs, and trying to refound a clear sense of what socialism means today.

src: Are you buying from anybody else because can we get a better price on the whole lot?
mt: Stai comprando da qualcun altro perché possiamo ottenere un prezzo migliore per l'intero lotto?

src: In the minds of those who approved of it, the Commonwealth was to be an organization to which no one who was unwilling need apply, and in which those who had joined were to reach their decisions on the basis of consensus: the goal to be pursued was an uncoerced acknowledgement of Britain as the senior partner in a world-wide enterprise; the position to be sought was the supremely equivocal but potentially supreme satisfying one of primus inter pares.
mt: Nella mente di coloro che l'hanno approvata, il Commonwealth doveva essere un'organizzazione a cui nessuno che non lo volesse avrebbe dovuto aderire, e in cui coloro che si erano uniti avrebbero raggiunto le loro decisioni sulla base del consenso: l'obiettivo da perseguire era un riconoscimento non coercitivo della Gran Bretagna come partner senior in un'impresa mondiale; la posizione da ricercare era quella supremamente equivoca ma potenzialmente supremamente soddisfacente di primus inter pares.

src: He really wanted to put on a play on maybe Broadway at the time — something different.
mt: Él quería montar una obra de teatro, quizás en Broadway en ese momento, algo diferente.

src: For example, she may be required to be assessed on her nursing skills for examination purposes during the allocation, and may need extra help for this purpose.
mt: Per esempio, potrebbe essere richiesta una valutazione delle sue abilità infermieristiche per gli esami durante l'assegnazione, e potrebbe aver bisogno di ulteriore aiuto per questo scopo.

src: In many teaching establishments, a media resources officer is available to advise on equipment, materials, maintenance of equipment and production of visual and audio aids.

src: As eventually published, the proposals do not distinguish between fuels, and raise the ceiling by over half to 650 mg per cubic metre.

src: To protect a buyer, it is best to advise enquiring carefully at the property: and include in one's requisitions on title, specific enquiry (now a standard printed requisition) as to whether any person other than the seller has any interest in the property.
mt: Per proteggere un acquirente, è meglio consigliare di informarsi attentamente presso la proprietà: e includere nelle proprie richieste sul titolo, una richiesta specifica (ora una richiesta stampata standard) per sapere se qualsiasi persona diversa dal venditore ha un interesse nella proprietà.

src: Every year or so since ‘76 found Thompson in some far-flung place, emerging from the fictional telephone box to perform heroically and beat the world, or Europe or the Commonwealth, the great all-rounder, Victor Ludorum.
mt: Cada año, desde el 76, Thompson aparecía en algún lugar lejano, saliendo de la cabina telefónica ficticia para actuar heroicamente y vencer al mundo, o a Europa o a la Commonwealth, el gran polifacético, Victor Ludorum.

src: ‘Your ankle appears to have recovered remarkably,’ he said caustically, switching the subject.
mt: “Parece que su tobillo se ha recuperado notablemente”, dijo cáusticamente, cambiando de tema.

src: I've had to take care of things for you —’

src: In large-scale national surveys, as carried out regularly by market research firms and government agencies, interviews may be carried out over the whole country and the people who have the task of analyzing several hundred or thousand schedules cannot possibly be for ever phoning through to the interviewers to ask what some cryptic little scribble opposite question number 15 is supposed to mean.
mt: In indagini nazionali su larga scala, come quelle condotte regolarmente da società di ricerche di mercato e da agenzie governative, le interviste possono essere condotte in tutto il paese e le persone che hanno il compito di analizzare diverse centinaia o migliaia di questionari non possono telefonare per sempre agli intervistatori per chiedere cosa significhi un piccolo scarabocchio criptico accanto alla domanda numero 15.

src: But I bumped into Chris who'd been recording with Steve (Buzzcocks) Diggle, who was looking for a guitar player to do a few gigs, and Chris kind of trapped me into that.
mt: Pero me encontré con Chris, que había estado grabando con Steve (Buzzcocks) Diggle, que buscaba un guitarrista para hacer unos cuantos conciertos, y Chris me atrapó en eso.

src: And for all his fans over here, I'd like to let them know that he called DJ and me aside then and asked us if we'd be interested in touring Europe.
mt: Y para todos sus fans de aquí, me gustaría que supieran que él llamó a DJ y a mí aparte entonces y nos preguntó si estaríamos interesados en hacer una gira por Europa.

src: So often the push is in the opposite direction, to doing research which doesn't involve one in long-term contact with the schools and this, of course, is one of the reasons why this type of research isn't so often done, but I hope to continue researching in classrooms, yes.
mt: Spesso la spinta è nella direzione opposta, verso la ricerca che non implica un contatto a lungo termine con le scuole e questo, naturalmente, è uno dei motivi per cui questo tipo di ricerca non viene fatto così spesso, ma spero di continuare a fare ricerca nelle aule, sì.

src: Carol, you've been looking into women and education.
mt: Carol, has estado investigando sobre mujeres y educación.

src: Really we still know very little about what teachers actually do in the classroom and it's all very well standing back in university and saying teachers should do this and should do that, but in order to be able to offer guidance I think we really need to investigate further in mixed ability classrooms to discover how teachers at the moment are dealing with the situation and where we might offer them more support, and that's the direction I'd like to see investigations going; rather than more of the grandiose large-scale quantitative studies, which collect lots of figures and statistics, I'd like to see a lot more studies in actual classrooms looking at actual teachers teaching, looking at what they do and how we can improve that.
mt: In realtà sappiamo ancora molto poco su cosa fanno realmente gli insegnanti in classe e va bene stare all'università e dire che gli insegnanti dovrebbero fare questo e dovrebbero fare quello, ma per poter offrire indicazioni penso che dobbiamo davvero indagare ulteriormente nelle classi con studenti di diverse abilità per scoprire come gli insegnanti al momento stanno gestendo la situazione e dove possiamo offrire loro un maggiore supporto, e questa è la direzione che vorrei vedere nelle indagini; piuttosto che più di questi studi quantitativi grandiosi su larga scala, che raccolgono un sacco di cifre e statistiche, vorrei vedere molti più studi nelle aule reali che guardano gli insegnanti reali che insegnano, che guardano cosa fanno e come possiamo migliorarlo.

src: Heavy trading in New York before Brazil announced smelt like insider trading.
mt: Las fuertes transacciones en Nueva York antes de que Brasil lo anunciara parecían operaciones con información privilegiada.

src: The company claims that customers say that they want to develop at the workgroup level in an open systems environment, on a range of hardware and under different operating systems, and to share data in a decentralised development environment, rather than have it all tied to the Repository on the mainframe server.
mt: La società sostiene che i clienti affermano di voler sviluppare a livello di gruppo di lavoro in un ambiente di sistemi aperti, su una gamma di hardware e sotto diversi sistemi operativi, e di voler condividere i dati in un ambiente di sviluppo decentralizzato, piuttosto che avere tutto legato al Repository sul server mainframe.

src: It is interesting to note that, while the first and last named are fanatical behaviourists, believing that everything is subject to unlimited moulding and rearrangement through a process of reward and punishment, the three in the middle are fanatical instinctivists, insisting that virtually everything and anything is inherited, a gift (or a grief) of the genes and not subject to the environment.
mt: È interessante notare che, mentre il primo e l'ultimo sono fanatici comportamentisti, convinti che tutto sia soggetto a una formazione e a una riorganizzazione illimitate attraverso un processo di ricompensa e punizione, i tre di mezzo sono fanatici istintivi, che insistono sul fatto che praticamente tutto e qualsiasi cosa sia ereditata, un dono (o un dolore) dei geni e non soggetto all'ambiente.

src: Basquiat's work is also widely praised, at least in the Whitney catalogue, where six essays compare the one-time graffiti artist who died of a heroin overdose at the age of twenty-seven to Leonardo da Vinci, Goya, Vincent van Gogh, and Jackson Pollock.
mt: El trabajo de Basquiat también es ampliamente elogiado, al menos en el catálogo de Whitney, donde seis ensayos comparan al artista de graffiti que murió de una sobredosis de heroína a los veintisiete años con Leonardo da Vinci, Goya, Vincent van Gogh y Jackson Pollock.

src: As we have seen, there may be cultural barriers to such reading, but leaving aside that potential difficulty, we invite the student to respond uniquely and personally to the text, to tune in to the true voice of feeling, to participate in its expressiveness; in short, to have an aesthetic experience.
mt: Come abbiamo visto, potrebbero esserci delle barriere culturali a una tale lettura, ma lasciando da parte questa potenziale difficoltà, invitiamo lo studente a rispondere in modo unico e personale al testo, a sintonizzarsi con la vera voce del sentimento, a partecipare alla sua espressività; in breve, a vivere un'esperienza estetica.

src: By mid-way through the four-day London Original Print fair (the eighth) a number of dealers were reporting some encouraging results, and by the close of the event every participant had found buyers.
mt: A metà della fiera di Londra Original Print di quattro giorni (l’ottava), diversi commercianti hanno segnalato risultati incoraggianti e alla fine dell’evento ogni partecipante ha trovato acquirenti.

src: Again, an extra quango wouldn't be needed and er he's probably aware of that there is a develo er there is a group of er of er various regulators who erm who operate under the acronym finn F I double N N and which is referred to er in the fact that I think the chancellor announced something about it.

src: Obviously we do not want to be in two minds up to the last day and he wouldn't do that but there is quite a period of discretion where the time gets shorter and er he would have to decide.
mt: Obviamente, no queremos estar indecisos hasta el último día y él no haría eso, pero hay un período de discreción en el que el tiempo se acorta y él tendría que decidir.

src: We welcome people from every party, it doesn't really matter which party, or even if they belong to no party, who are just committed to seeing a representative representation, seeing more women in there, because women in this country, just as a matter of fact, have a rather different experience from most men, and if you're deciding then you want there the people who have had a wide range of experience, who can bring that experience to bear on deciding.
mt: Damos la bienvenida a personas de todos los partidos, no importa de qué partido, o incluso si no pertenecen a ningún partido, que solo estén comprometidos a ver una representación representativa, ver más mujeres allí, porque las mujeres en este país, simplemente como cuestión de hecho, tienen una experiencia bastante diferente a la de la mayoría de los hombres, y si estás decidiendo, entonces quieres que las personas que hayan tenido una amplia gama de experiencias, que puedan aportar esa experiencia para tomar decisiones.

src: I suppose, well, my children would say my answer to everything is to say to them breathe, you know, and, erm, you know, just relax, and then that allows you maybe to start looking at other things, but to get to the state where you can begin to look at things without the fears and emotions getting in the way.
mt: Supongo, bueno, mis hijos dirían que mi respuesta a todo es decirles que respiren, ya sabes, y, erm, ya sabes, simplemente relájate, y eso te permite, quizás, empezar a mirar otras cosas, pero llegar al estado en el que puedes empezar a mirar las cosas sin que los miedos y las emociones se interpongan.

src: I think it's really encouraged by the fact that the gipsy sites which one sees around the County at the present moment because there is very little control over them, are most unsightly and wreak havoc on the countryside, and people do not wish this to happen in their own area.
mt: Creo que lo que realmente anima a esto es el hecho de que los sitios gitanos que se ven en el condado en este momento, porque hay muy poco control sobre ellos, son muy antiestéticos y causan estragos en el campo, y la gente no quiere que esto suceda en su propio área.

src: All I was told is that you're getting twelve months guarantee, but you've got to have a three thousand mile service, and as the gentleman said erm I recorded the deliveries and sent them all back and on the third one, when I took it in I asked if they'd put a new set of points in for me and erm unfortunately when it came out there was no compression at all and because because I it was suggested that I dug my heels in a bit and got an independent report and erm basically they told me to get lost because it cost fifty pound to carry out the assessment.
mt: Mi hanno solo detto che la garanzia è di dodici mesi, ma che bisogna fare una manutenzione ogni tremila miglia, e come ha detto il signore, ho registrato le consegne e le ho rispedite tutte e al terzo, quando l'ho portato dentro ho chiesto se mi avrebbero messo un nuovo set di punti e sfortunatamente quando è uscito non c'era affatto compressione e perché perché mi è stato suggerito di insistere un po' e di fare un rapporto indipendente e fondamentalmente mi hanno detto di andarmene perché costava cinquanta sterline fare la valutazione.
