mt: Molte delle 226 scuole che negli ultimi tre anni sono diventate indipendenti nelle loro attività temono di essere vittime di ritorsioni se dovessero essere riconsegnate a autorità locali ostili.

src: There are clear ‘fits’ between the two lists, bolstering the view that a synergetic relationship is possible, and some obvious benefits are almost bound to derive from bringing two organisations together, just as sitting next to Nellie traditionally gradually fused the experience of the expert with the youthful vigour of the apprentice.
mt: Ci sono chiare "combinazioni" tra le due liste, che rafforzano l'idea che una relazione sinergica sia possibile, e alcuni evidenti vantaggi sono quasi inevitabili quando si uniscono due organizzazioni, proprio come quando, seduti accanto a Nellie, l'esperienza dell'esperto si fonde gradualmente con il vigore giovanile dell'apprendista.

src: It said Elizabeth Tamposi, already fired by President Bush, and her officials in the State Department's consular affairs bureau acted in ‘partisan hopes of derailing the Clinton campaign.’
mt: Señaló que Elizabeth Tamposi, ya despedida por el presidente Bush, y sus funcionarios de la oficina de asuntos consulares del Departamento de Estado actuaron con “esperanzas partidistas de descarrilar la campaña de Clinton”.

src: Amongst smaller introduced animals are fire ants, which out-compete with the native ants (and which can cause uncomfortable nights for camping scientists); and cockroaches, which have been discovered on one or two islands and may have been transported inadvertently amongst supplies destined for scientists engaged in extended research.
mt: Tra gli animali introdotti più piccoli ci sono le formiche rosse, che competono con le formiche autoctone (e che possono causare notti scomode per gli scienziati che fanno campeggio); e gli scarafaggi, che sono stati scoperti su una o due isole e potrebbero essere stati trasportati inavvertitamente tra le provviste destinate agli scienziati impegnati in ricerche estese.

src: For many years the station scientists neglected to research these introduced species, probably because no one could foresee the possibility of eradicating them.
mt: Per molti anni gli scienziati della stazione hanno trascurato di studiare queste specie introdotte, probabilmente perché nessuno poteva prevedere la possibilità di eradicarle.

src: ‘I wondered if there were any external pressures that led your husband to switch’ or
mt: “Me preguntaba si había alguna presión externa que llevó a su esposo a cambiar” o

src: The decision is quashed and the authority issues a new ruling.
mt: La decisione è annullata e l’autorità emette un nuovo provvedimento.

src: ‘Look, couldn't we just go along to the pub, enjoy a drink, and talk about fishing instead?’ he pleaded.
mt: “Mira, ¿no podríamos ir a la taberna, disfrutar de una bebida y hablar de pesca en su lugar?”, suplicó.

src: They usually incorporate internal steel members for extra strength, and because of the relatively large cross-section of the various stiles and rails they can serve as a suitable replacement for many older-style houses with timber windows.
mt: Di solito incorporano elementi in acciaio interni per una maggiore resistenza e, grazie alla relativamente grande sezione trasversale dei vari montanti e binari, possono fungere da sostituto idoneo per molte case in stile antico con finestre in legno.

src: The next time you call at your local council offices to collect some forms for applying for Building Regulations, don't be surprised if you are asked, ‘What type of forms do you want — Full plans or Building Notice?’
mt: La prossima volta che vi recate presso gli uffici del vostro comune per ritirare dei moduli per la richiesta di un permesso di costruzione, non stupitevi se vi viene chiesto: “Che tipo di moduli desiderate: piani completi o notifica di costruzione?”

src: Hence, an illusion that the children would sooner or later return home was sustained, mitigating the need to plan for another outcome which, in any case, was considered inferior and likely to cause equivalent or greater harm.
mt: Quindi, si è mantenuta l’illusione che i bambini prima o poi sarebbero tornati a casa, attenuando la necessità di pianificare un altro esito che, in ogni caso, era considerato inferiore e in grado di causare danni equivalenti o maggiori.

src: I am not going out of my mind, she thought, and if, at the moment, the outside world does not recognise me for what I am, my sister knows she has only to speak a word here and there, to decide, and who will listen to me?
mt: No me estoy volviendo loca, pensó, y si, de momento, el mundo exterior no me reconoce por lo que soy, mi hermana sabe que solo tiene que decir una palabra aquí y allá, para decidir, y ¿quién me va a escuchar?

src: Sharing in such a personal faith unites the diversity of human beings, bringing us together with others.
mt: La condivisione di una fede così personale unisce la diversità degli esseri umani, ci riunisce con gli altri.

src: All the same, he insisted on making one last inspection.
mt: Aun así, insistió en hacer una última inspección.

src: The industry is trying to be seen to be more responsible, think long-term and structure transactions more prudently.
mt: Il settore sta cercando di apparire più responsabile, di pensare a lungo termine e di strutturare le transazioni in modo più prudente.

src: S1 charges S2 for management, covering a variety of commonly incurred expenditure (including his services); however, no analysis of this recharge is available.
mt: S1 addebita a S2 una gestione che copre una serie di spese comunemente sostenute (compresi i suoi servizi); tuttavia, non è disponibile alcuna analisi di questo addebito.

src: And now Scottish Natural Heritage has asked the Institute of Terrestrial Ecology, Banchory, in liaison with the Scottish Agricultural Statistics Service and Biosphere Consultancies, to conduct an investigation to determine the current status of adders in Scotland.
mt: Ahora, Scottish Natural Heritage ha pedido al Institute of Terrestrial Ecology, Banchory, en colaboración con el Scottish Agricultural Statistics Service y Biosphere Consultancies, que lleve a cabo una investigación para determinar el estado actual de las víboras en Escocia.

src: Ken Coates, Nottingham's MEP and my colleague at the Russell Foundation where I work as a researcher, has raised the alert on this.
mt: Ken Coates, deputato europeo di Nottingham e mio collega alla Russell Foundation dove lavoro come ricercatore, ha lanciato l'allarme su questo.

src: Just telephone the nearest Cosmos office to book any UK departure point for your holiday.
mt: Basta chiamare l'ufficio Cosmos più vicino per prenotare qualsiasi punto di partenza nel Regno Unito per la vostra vacanza.

src: Having expressed a somewhat contentious view on Caribbean parents' distorted appreciation of their function in relation to their children's formal education, I am left to qualify and substantiate, particularly as it has a weighty bearing on the general argument of the entire book.
mt: Dopo aver espresso un parere un po' polemico sulla percezione distorta che i genitori caraibici hanno della loro funzione in relazione all'istruzione formale dei loro figli, mi sento in dovere di qualificare e motivare, soprattutto perché ha un'incidenza notevole sull'argomento generale dell'intero libro.

src: ‘Gentleman Jim’ had previously retired from the ring rather than fight a black man, but was tempted in an effort to curb the mounting confidence of blacks and re-establish white dominance in the sport.
mt: “Gentleman Jim” ya se había retirado del ring en lugar de luchar contra un hombre negro, pero se sintió tentado por un esfuerzo para frenar la creciente confianza de los negros y restablecer el dominio blanco en el deporte.

src: We ran the experiment in 12 sessions of eight subjects each; eight of the sessions involved the eight groups, the remaining four sessions involved the subjects performing the experiment individually.
mt: Abbiamo condotto l'esperimento in 12 sessioni di otto soggetti ciascuna; otto delle sessioni hanno coinvolto gli otto gruppi, le restanti quattro sessioni hanno coinvolto i soggetti che hanno eseguito l'esperimento individualmente.

src: Although many people do not take such a drastic step from a very special garden to a flat, most of us leave a few favourite plants behind when we move house, so framing a few of them serves as a lovely reminder of times gone by.
mt: Anche se molte persone non compiono un passaggio così drastico da un giardino molto speciale a un appartamento, la maggior parte di noi lascia alcune piante preferite quando si trasferisce, quindi incorniciarne alcune serve come un bel ricordo dei tempi passati.

src: However, care should be taken not to use a professional counsellor as a "fixer" who enables one to avoid addressing one's own issues.
mt: Tuttavia, occorre prestare attenzione a non utilizzare un consulente professionale come un "riparatore" che consente di evitare di affrontare i propri problemi.

src: Because they hadn't managed, Debbie felt landlords were entitled only to the 10 per cent tenant-finding fee and therefore owed her £2,400 (3 months' rent plus the deposit).
mt: Como no lo habían logrado, Debbie pensó que los propietarios solo tenían derecho al 10 % de la comisión de búsqueda de inquilinos y, por lo tanto, le debían 2.400 £ (3 meses de alquiler más el depósito).

src: THERE is no need for Mr Smith to impose taxes on capital or on financial institutions though: his policies look set to harm by knocking the most valuable asset owned by most voters — their homes.
mt: No hay necesidad de que el Sr. Smith imponga impuestos al capital o a las instituciones financieras, aunque: sus políticas parecen destinadas a dañar al golpear el activo más valioso que poseen la mayoría de los votantes: sus hogares.

src: Consultants told the paper that IBM has been dissecting the two most recent pre-release versions of NT at its Toronto labs to assess the time and money that would be required to implement it, and reckon a product could arrive at the turn of the year.
mt: I consulenti hanno dichiarato al giornale che IBM ha analizzato le ultime due versioni di NT in anteprima nei suoi laboratori di Toronto per valutare il tempo e i soldi necessari per implementarlo e stimano che un prodotto potrebbe arrivare alla fine dell'anno.

src: If you feel that your award is wrong in some way you can ask for the decision to be reviewed or appeal — details of how to do this are available from social security benefit offices.
mt: Se ritiene che la prestazione gli sia stata calcolata in modo errato, può chiedere che la decisione sia riesaminata o presentare ricorso; i dettagli su come procedere sono disponibili presso gli uffici delle prestazioni di sicurezza sociale.

src: Whilst coping with immediate problems, it was important to plan for the future.
mt: Mentre si affrontano i problemi immediati, è importante pianificare per il futuro.

src: He'd call it investigating.
mt: Él lo llamaría investigación.

src: Stories were told about how they had actually inflicted significant harm on some visiting fans when situations had got out of hand.
mt: Se contaron historias sobre cómo habían infligido un daño significativo a algunos aficionados visitantes cuando las situaciones se habían salido de control.

src: It's real good when they're working in the lounge, isn't it, Iris?
mt: Es realmente bueno cuando están trabajando en el salón, ¿verdad, Iris?

src: During the succession crisis of 1553, Edward's Roman Catholic sister Mary studiously declined to speak out about the possibility of a restoration of papal authority in England.
mt: Durante la crisis sucesoria de 1553, la hermana católica romana de Eduardo, María, se negó a hablar sobre la posibilidad de una restauración de la autoridad papal en Inglaterra.

src: Without such a juxtaposition, you cannot assess twentieth century design rationally.
mt: Senza una tale giustapposizione, non è possibile valutare razionalmente il design del ventesimo secolo.

src: The best type for a luxury lawn, these cut with a scissor action to finish well.
mt: El mejor tipo para un césped de lujo, se cortan con una acción de tijera para terminar bien.

src: Their Anglo-Italian Cup-tie with Ascoli erupted in two minutes of fury — but the Football League will not act.
mt: Su partido de la Copa Anglo-Italiana contra el Ascoli se convirtió en dos minutos de furia, pero la Football League no va a tomar medidas.

src: Platt visited Birmingham briefly yesterday to announce a new sponsorship deal with Brymon European Airways before returning to Italy for a Juventus friendly tonight.
mt: Platt ha visitato brevemente Birmingham ieri per annunciare un nuovo accordo di sponsorizzazione con Brymon European Airways prima di tornare in Italia per un’amichevole con la Juventus stasera.

src: Oldham incurred losses of more than £500,000 last season — their first back in the top flight for more than 60 years.
mt: El Oldham sufrió pérdidas de más de 500.000 £ la temporada pasada, su primera en la máxima división en más de 60 años.

src: Sometimes I will have abandoned a painting, got really tired of it and feel it's not getting anywhere, and you will come and say something that makes me look at it again and think: oh yes, I could just pull that one together.
mt: A veces he abandonado una pintura, me he cansado de ella y siento que no va a ninguna parte, y tú vienes y dices algo que me hace mirarla de nuevo y pensar: oh sí, podría juntar esa.

src: No need to be stationary when signing.
mt: Non è necessario essere fermi quando si firma.

src: And Lady Paignton, whom you met yesterday, is always saying she wished she had somebody to shop for her.
mt: Y Lady Paignton, a quien conociste ayer, siempre dice que le gustaría tener a alguien que hiciera las compras por ella.

src: They also brought their campaign onto the national stage through their participation in the Anti-Nuclear Power Show at the Carnsore Point site.
mt: También llevaron su campaña a un escenario nacional a través de su participación en el Anti-Nuclear Power Show en el sitio de Carnsore Point.

src: National Semiconductor tried valiantly with its LM32900, and the take-over of Fairchild saw the demise of the FSP100.
mt: National Semiconductor ha fatto un tentativo valoroso con il suo LM32900, e l'acquisizione di Fairchild ha portato alla scomparsa del FSP100.

src: Ali Idrissi Kaitouni was sentenced to 15 years for writing poems about social injustice and political oppression in Morocco, deemed by the state to constitute a crime against internal security.
mt: Ali Idrissi Kaitouni è stato condannato a 15 anni per aver scritto poesie sull'ingiustizia sociale e l'oppressione politica in Marocco, considerate dal governo un crimine contro la sicurezza interna.

src: Four tries went to flanker Mike Budd, returning impressively to action after prolonged injury problems.
mt: El flanker Mike Budd, que volvió a la acción de forma impresionante tras un largo período de lesiones, marcó cuatro tries.

src: In an interview after the game he said, ‘In La Rochelle we never start a game with the intention of causing harm.
mt: En una entrevista después del partido, dijo: “En La Rochelle nunca empezamos un partido con la intención de causar daño.

src: Individuals respond not as one man islands, but within a framework of family, group, community and national involvements.
mt: Gli individui non rispondono come isole, ma all'interno di un quadro di coinvolgimenti familiari, di gruppo, comunitari e nazionali.

src: One suburban Anglican church in Surrey, England discovered, after reviewing their membership, that they had to gain on average thirty-four new members each year just to stay where they were in terms of membership, such was the high level of mobility in their community.
mt: Una iglesia anglicana de un suburbio de Surrey, Inglaterra, descubrió, después de revisar su membresía, que tenían que ganar en promedio treinta y cuatro nuevos miembros cada año solo para mantenerse en el lugar en el que se encontraban en términos de membresía, tal era el alto nivel de movilidad en su comunidad.

src: They were kept waiting for four hours before being granted permission to cover the Match of The Century (starring Paul Gascoigne).
mt: Los hicieron esperar cuatro horas antes de que se les concediera el permiso para cubrir el Partido del Siglo (con Paul Gascoigne como protagonista).

src: Nynex Corp's New York Telephone has reached an agreement with Newbridge Networks Inc for equipment to enable it to offer Nynex Enterprise Services, which provides business customers with private line services whereby with a single telephone call, they can reroute transmissions, add new circuits and raise available bandwidth to set up videoconferences: Newbridge is supplying its 4602 MainStreet Intelligent NetworkStation, 3645 MainStreet High Capacity Bandwidth Manager, and 3624 MainStreet Intelligent Channel Bank.
mt: New York Telephone di Nynex Corp ha raggiunto un accordo con Newbridge Networks Inc per l'acquisto di apparecchiature che le consentiranno di offrire Nynex Enterprise Services, che fornisce ai clienti aziendali servizi di linea privata che consentono, con una sola chiamata telefonica, di reindirizzare le trasmissioni, aggiungere nuovi circuiti e aumentare la larghezza di banda disponibile per impostare videoconferenze: Newbridge sta fornendo la sua 4602 MainStreet Intelligent NetworkStation, 3645 MainStreet High Capacity Bandwidth Manager e 3624 MainStreet Intelligent Channel Bank.

src: They were excellent in every aspect and always more than willing to provide counsel to allow hotel managers to conduct their business with the backing of a truly professional team.
mt: Sono stati eccellenti sotto ogni aspetto e sempre più che disponibili a fornire consulenza per consentire ai gestori di hotel di condurre le loro attività con il supporto di un team veramente professionale.

src: This is seen as an important means of getting away from the elitist concept and encouraging everyone to think long-term, even if his or her immediate task involves short-term objectives.
mt: Si tratta di un mezzo importante per uscire dal concetto elitario e per incoraggiare tutti a pensare a lungo termine, anche se il proprio compito immediato comporta obiettivi a breve termine.

src: We made two hundred and forty five pounds on Thriller of the Year one hundred and nineteen pounds on Tea for Two but that is after we've donated three hundred pounds to Whiston Hospital we made a thousand and eighteen pounds on the panto Wuthering Heights we lost four hundred and nine pounds, but that was basically that we do costume plays and have to hire the erm fixtures and set pieces from Wrightsons or wherever we're always going to be in this position and I think it's the tradition of the Garrick that we continue to do them, and I think we have to accept that we may have losses in future on those particular erm things.
mt: Hicimos doscientos cuarenta y cinco libras con Thriller of the Year, ciento diecinueve libras con Tea for Two, pero eso fue después de que donáramos trescientos libras al Whiston Hospital. Hicimos mil dieciocho libras con el panto Wuthering Heights, perdimos cuatrocientos nueve libras, pero eso fue básicamente porque hacemos obras de teatro y tenemos que alquilar los, eh, accesorios y los decorados de Wrightsons o donde sea. Siempre estaremos en esta posición y creo que es la tradición del Garrick que sigamos haciéndolos, y creo que tenemos que aceptar que podemos tener pérdidas en el futuro con estas, eh, cosas en particular.

src: Children aged 5–16 years will pay half the adult price if sharing a room with an adult.
mt: I bambini di età compresa tra 5 e 16 anni pagano la metà della tariffa per adulti se condividono la camera con un adulto.

src: They will identify and ‘think through’ the issues — or rather analyze the market that substitutes for political thought — and create the slogans and policies in terms of the conditioned reflexes of the electorate which can be controlled by political advertising on the issues.
mt: Essi identificheranno e “ponderanno” i problemi – o meglio, analizzeranno il mercato che sostituisce il pensiero politico – e creeranno gli slogan e le politiche in termini di riflessi condizionati dell’elettorato che possono essere controllati dalla pubblicità politica sui problemi.

src: In an amiable parody of an interview he once heard being given by Sir Adrian Boult, Gould spelt out the attitude to recording of that older generation: roughly, ‘I don't mind recording occasionally, old boy — not everyone gets to concerts — and we'll do our best, but I don't want any ‘patching’, we must keep the long line intact’.
mt: En una amable parodia de una entrevista que una vez escuchó que daba Sir Adrian Boult, Gould explicó la actitud hacia la grabación de esa generación anterior: más o menos, «no me importa grabar de vez en cuando, viejo amigo, no todo el mundo puede ir a los conciertos, y haremos todo lo posible, pero no quiero ningún «retoque», debemos mantener la larga línea intacta».

src: She lied to me, though, when I asked at about the age of eight what she'd done: she said she'd worked in an office, clerked.
mt: Sin embargo, ella me mintió cuando le pregunté, cuando tenía unos ocho años, qué había hecho: dijo que había trabajado en una oficina, como empleada.

src: His opponents, massed in Cable Street, were determined that he should not pass, and 6,000 police were needed to keep order and try to clear the way.
mt: Sus oponentes, reunidos en Cable Street, estaban decididos a que no pasara, y se necesitaron 6.000 policías para mantener el orden e intentar despejar el camino.

src: Joyce described a crowd of three or four hundred blocking the way, shouting, chanting, and saluting with clenched fists of the ‘Red Front’.
mt: Joyce describió una multitud de tres o cuatrocientos que bloqueaban el camino, gritando, cantando y saludando con los puños cerrados del 'Frente Rojo'.

src: Accompanied by Sophia Rahman, he showed imagination in his programme — the surprisingly neglected Schumann A minor Sonata, Dallapiccola's Two Studies and, best of all, Szymanowski's Nocturne and Tarantella.
mt: Acompañado por Sophia Rahman, mostró imaginación en su programa: la sorprendentemente descuidada Sonata en la menor de Schumann, los Dos estudios de Dallapiccola y, mejor aún, el Nocturno y la Tarantela de Szymanowski.

src: The girls sat down on a large pew-looking bench in the alcove and laughed at Billy who was standing with his back to the blazing logs, mocking a policeman.
mt: Las chicas se sentaron en un gran banco parecido a un banco de iglesia en el alcoba y se rieron de Billy, que estaba de pie con la espalda apoyada en los troncos ardientes, burlándose de un policía.

src: One would expect some cases to be widely publicized, especially when there is serious re-offending after a previous life sentence.
mt: Ci si aspetterebbe che alcuni casi siano ampiamente pubblicizzati, soprattutto quando c'è una recidiva grave dopo una precedente condanna all'ergastolo.

src: And he is quick to point out that it was a joint decision to launch a serious bid, alternatively:
mt: Y él es rápido en señalar que fue una decisión conjunta lanzar una oferta seria, alternativamente:

src: There are times when Chancellors are right to fuss with mini-measures, and there are times when they need to take bold action.
mt: Hay momentos en los que los cancilleres tienen razón al hacer alboroto con medidas minúsculas y hay momentos en los que necesitan tomar medidas audaces.

src: Mr Heseltine refrained from commenting on the report, which does not form part of the Government's coal review, expected to be published next week.
mt: El señor Heseltine se abstuvo de comentar el informe, que no forma parte de la revisión del carbón del Gobierno, que se espera publicar la próxima semana.

src: But he admitted he could not be sure he saw a soldier strike another soldier with his rifle.
mt: Pero admitió que no podía estar seguro de haber visto a un soldado golpear a otro con su rifle.

src: It is impossible to distinguish technically between strategic planning and business planning: both use techniques such as SWOT analysis.
mt: È impossibile distinguere tecnicamente tra pianificazione strategica e pianificazione aziendale: entrambi utilizzano tecniche come l'analisi SWOT.

src: He then suggests that the former can either directly create the conditions for the reproduction of the relations of production, presumably by quelling any sign of working class insubordination (i.e., a feature of economic practice depends upon political practice), or they can do so indirectly, by establishing a situation in which ideological state apparatuses can exert their influence (i.e., in which ideological practice determines economic practice).
mt: Quindi suggerisce che i primi possono creare direttamente le condizioni per la riproduzione dei rapporti di produzione, presumibilmente mettendo a tacere qualsiasi segno di insubordinazione della classe lavoratrice (cioè, una caratteristica della pratica economica dipende dalla pratica politica), oppure possono farlo indirettamente, stabilendo una situazione in cui gli apparati ideologici di Stato possono esercitare la loro influenza (cioè, in cui la pratica ideologica determina la pratica economica).

src: Here we exhibit a significant divergence from the historical pessimism of Adorno's negative dialectics which in certain respects poststructuralism might appear to resemble.
mt: Qui mostriamo una significativa divergenza dal pessimismo storico della dialettica negativa di Adorno che, per certi versi, il post-strutturalismo potrebbe sembrare simile.

src: As a result, by the time the DET surveyed farm schooling in 1986, only 3 per cent of the total of 5,782 farm schools offered education for more than seven grades, and 21 per cent did not offer education beyond four grades.
mt: Como resultado, cuando el DET realizó la encuesta sobre la escolarización en las granjas en 1986, solo el 3% del total de 5.782 escuelas de granjas ofrecían educación para más de siete grados y el 21% no ofrecía educación más allá de cuatro grados.

src: Tony Wilson, whose previous fight ended in farce when his mother climbed into the ring and attacked his opponent, returned to traditional form in the ring last night.
mt: Tony Wilson, cuya pelea anterior terminó en una farsa cuando su madre subió al ring y atacó a su oponente, volvió a su forma tradicional en el ring anoche.

src: They would certainly be a safer option for a first aeroplane after the club trike than the twitchy taildragging Silvaire and its lookalike cousins.
mt: Sin duda, serían una opción más segura para un primer avión después del club trike que el Silvaire, con su cola que se arrastra y sus primos similares.

src: Sometimes management may allow you to keep your room later but they are entitled to charge you if they wish.
mt: A volte la direzione può consentire di tenere la stanza più a lungo, ma ha il diritto di addebitare un costo se lo desidera.

src: In other words, to slim is to decide rationally with a conscious aim in view.
mt: In altre parole, dimagrire è decidere razionalmente con un obiettivo consapevole in vista.

src: The band, Deep Throat, were playing all these Brontosaurus Rex numbers instead of that underground stuff they usually play and everyone was dancing smartly.
mt: La banda, Deep Throat, estaba tocando todos los temas de Brontosaurus Rex en lugar de esa música underground que suelen tocar y todo el mundo estaba bailando con elegancia.

src: ...and to encourage you to shop for Christmas at Debenhams we'll be making a special offer that you won't be able to resist...
mt: ...y para animaros a comprar en Debenhams para Navidad, haremos una oferta especial a la que no podréis resistir...

src: Those that remain have invested personally in time and energy; they have a stake in maintaining the system that has been developed and replacements will need to make their mark and have freedom to develop new ideas, from this a sense of identity, ownership and commitment will develop.
mt: Coloro che rimangono hanno investito tempo ed energia; hanno un interesse nel mantenere il sistema che è stato sviluppato e i sostituti dovranno lasciare il segno e avere la libertà di sviluppare nuove idee, da cui si svilupperà un senso di identità, di appartenenza e di impegno.

src: Self-denial and self-help, however, would not rally support for the hustings.
mt: Sin embargo, la abnegación y la autoayuda no reunirían apoyo para las elecciones.

src: The Afrikaans weekly newspaper, Vrye Weekblad, has named a South African conscript who, it says, was required to serve in the military as a spy.
mt: El periódico semanal afrikáans Vrye Weekblad ha nombrado a un recluta sudafricano que, según dice, fue requerido para servir en el ejército como espía.

src: The whereabouts of James Guerin, ISC's former chairman, are still unknown and he has yet to contact Ferranti's advisers.
mt: El paradero de James Guerin, el anterior presidente de ISC, aún se desconoce y aún no ha contactado con los asesores de Ferranti.

src: Other cottagers the teacher from Glasgow visited gave him a proof of their kindness; they presented him with a large basin of milk: he drank some of it, and would have left the remainder, but they signalled to him to drink it all, and the old man stood opposite the door to prevent his getting away till he was obliged, in answer to Gaelic gesticulations, to drink all the milk that was in the basin.
mt: Otros campesinos que visitó el maestro de Glasgow le dieron prueba de su amabilidad; le dieron una gran cubeta de leche: él bebió un poco y habría dejado el resto, pero le hicieron señas a él para que lo bebiera todo, y el anciano se puso de pie frente a la puerta para impedir que se fuera hasta que, en respuesta a las gesticulaciones gaélicas, se vio obligado a beber toda la leche que había en la cubeta.

src: Conversely their own recorded tales of well-known characters of that era, JTR omits, like Muckle Kate in Brig o' Turk.
mt: Por el contrario, omite los relatos grabados de personajes conocidos de esa época, como Muckle Kate en Brig o' Turk.
